commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: By the law of liberty; i.e. by the new law and doctrine of Christ. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Hilary of Arles
commentaries.content: By the New Testament law everyone is born again, free and equal with one another.

commentaries.author: Oecumenius
commentaries.content: The law of liberty is the one which does not recognize classes of persons. This is the law of Christ. Whoever shows favoritism is not free but a slave, for "A man is a slave to the one by whom he has been overcome.(2 Pt 2:19)"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
